caption:
Some places call to something ancient inside you — a wide open sky, red earth underfoot, the feeling that the world is bigger than your worries.

This skirt carries an entire landscape within it, a painted horizon you can wear and wander into. Paired back with clean white linen and a belt buckle that tells its own story, it's the kind of look that travels well — in spirit, if not always in miles. We are welcoming the new season with pieces that feel like somewhere else, somewhere free.

Skirt: @diega_paris
